meta.notes: Grass template payloads are aligned so ids, logical labels, and atlas visuals match. Added sand_on_grass_light and road_on_grass_light templates for procedural terrain patches.

grass_dark_on_grass_light.description: Light grass patch transitioning over dark grass. [A/B swapped in v3]

water_on_grass_light.description: Water patch transitioning over light grass.

grass_light_on_grass_dark.description: Dark grass patch transitioning over light grass. [A/B swapped in v3]

sand_on_grass_light.description: Sand patches transitioning over light grass.

road_on_grass_light.description: Sand patches transitioning over light grass.
